case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. DAVID GOSSELIN et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT GOSSELIN, DAVID , INDIVIDUALLY AND AND DBA DAVID GOSSELIN & ASSOCIATES DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-09-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-08-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-25-2007

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED JUL-17-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOSSELIN, DAVID , INDIVIDUALLY AND AND DBA DAVID GOSSELIN & ASSOCIATES

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $380.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GOSSELIN, DAVID , INDIVIDUALLY AND AND DBA DAVID GOSSELIN & ASSOCIATES
DECLARATION ERNEST I. KNOWLES FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION MARK SCHICKENDANTZ FILED RE: EQUIPMENT VALUATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION ANSON LOUIE FILED RE: COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOSSELIN, DAVID , INDIVIDUALLY AND AND DBA DAVID GOSSELIN & ASSOCIATES POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1999 PETERBILT 379 VIN 1XP5DR9X6XD501152 (PRPERTY VALUE IS $8,000.00), OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $20,069.68 DAMAGES, $2,350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $380.00 COSTS, $247.50 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,047.18

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOSSELIN, DAVID , INDIVIDUALLY AND AND DBA DAVID GOSSELIN & ASSOCIATES POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ONE TOPCON GPT8203A 3" REFLECTORLESS AUTO TRACKING TOTAL STATION; ONE RC-2RWN OPTICAL, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $20,069.68 DAMAGES, $2,350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $380.00 COSTS, $247.50 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,047.18, COMMUNICATIONS KIT WITH BLUETOOTH; ONE CARLSON ROBOTICS UPGRADE; ONE CARLSON BLUETOOTH UPGRADE; ONE SECO 360 PRISIM 6401-00-YEL; ONE SECO DATE COLLECTOR POLE BRACKET; ONE TOPCON SIDE MOUNT POLE BRACKET FOR RC-211", WHICH EQUIPMENT COLLECTIVELY HAS A FAIR MAKET VALUE OF $8,000.00. PER COURT ORDER GRANTING EX PARTE APPLICATION TO CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR IN JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC OF MARCH 17, 2008.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2007, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR IN JUDGMENT AND AMEND JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
ORDER GRANTING EX PARTE APPLICATION TO CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR IN JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC
